note: Two portable countertop dishwashers at near-identical price ($329 vs $350) and star rating — yet the COMFEE' dies at a median 4 months versus 11 for the EdgeStar. Same shelf, same price, but ~3x the cost per year of life ($1,050 vs $359).

Both cost $90 to the dollar. The AGLUCKY ice maker lasts a median 6 months; the SUPER DEAL twin-tub washer just 3 — so the washer costs twice as much per year of life ($360 vs $180) despite the identical sticker price.

The pricier $150 Giantex washer outlives the $120 countertop ice maker nearly 4-to-1 (median 11 vs 3 months), so it is dramatically cheaper to own: $164 vs $480 per year of life. Sticker price hides which product is actually the lemon.
